title: dactylorhiza isculana
intro: Dactylorhiza isculana, also known as the Iscula Spotted Orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Europe and the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza isculana include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin irritations. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the affected area.
